raw.objective: “to develop a population PK model for gabapentin appropriate for monitoring patients with neuropathic pain and for individualizing their dose regimens”
raw.covariates: WT on Vd, CrCL on Kel, Dose inversely on F,
raw.observations: Hyperbolic function for relationship dose/f, model predicted reasonably well for adults.
raw.dose: Steady-state oral dosing in chronic neuropathic pain patients
raw.structure: 1 compartment with first order absorption and elimination (Based on NONMEM results of paper)
raw.equations: BSA=0.0235*(WT**0.51456)*(HT**0.42246) P1=29.305-0.203*AGE P2=1344-43.76*SCr P3=P1*P2*WT*0.00073310 CrCLm=((100*P3)/(SCr*1440))*(1.73/BSA) CrCLf=CrCLm*0.9 CrCL=CrCLf*((1/0.9)**SEX) Dmax=823 D50=1120 F=Dmax/(D50+Dose) Kel=theta1*(CrCL/90.1)*(1+eta1) Vd=theta2*WT*(1+eta2) Ka=theta1 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1)+eps2 Where CrCLm is the creatinine clearance for men, and CrCLf for women, Dose is the most recent relevant GBP dose
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.11 theta2=0.91 theta3=0.44 omega1=0.07 omega2=0.12 sigma1=not reported sigma2=not reported

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with first order absorption and elimination (Based on NONMEM results of paper)

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: BSA=0.0235*(WT**0.51456)*(HT**0.42246) P1=29.305-0.203*AGE P2=1344-43.76*SCr P3=P1*P2*WT*0.00073310 CrCLm=((100*P3)/(SCr*1440))*(1.73/BSA) CrCLf=CrCLm*0.9 CrCL=CrCLf*((1/0.9)**SEX) Dmax=823 D50=1120 F=Dmax/(D50+Dose) Kel=theta1*(CrCL/90.1)*(1+eta1) Vd=theta2*WT*(1+eta2) Ka=theta1 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1)+eps2 Where CrCLm is the creatinine clearance for men, and CrCLf for women, Dose is the most recent relevant GBP dose
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Steady-state oral dosing in chronic neuropathic pain patients
study.objective: “to develop a population PK model for gabapentin appropriate for monitoring patients with neuropathic pain and for individualizing their dose regimens”

covariates.raw: WT on Vd, CrCL on Kel, Dose inversely on F,

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
